article_meta.title: Kid Rock Buries Bad Bunny in TMZ's Post-Super Bowl Halftime Show Poll 31 Chris Graythen/Getty ImagesWarner Todd Huston11

reasoning: The model correctly flagged several biased phrases in the author’s prose (e.g., loaded ‘buried,’ ‘rabidly anti-Trump,’ unsubstantiated statistics, mind-reading about TMZ). However, it used nonstandard/incorrect bias-type labels, missed notable biased phrases like ‘frontloaded the poll’ and ‘Fans did not fall for the push…,’ and committed one attribution error by flagging a paraphrased sentiment attributed to ‘many fans.’

custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items reflect genuine bias patterns in the author’s voice; only the paraphrased fans’ line is a clear overreach.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed at least two clear instances in author prose: ‘frontloaded the poll’ and ‘Fans did not fall for the push…’.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used nonstandard labels (e.g., ‘Loaded Language,’ ‘Implied Motive’) instead of the defined types; multiple mismatches.
